subject: A robed mage standing amid roiling fire and smoke, head bowed in introspection as flames rise around them
description: A solitary hooded figure stands in the center of the frame, draped in dark robes that catch firelight along their folds. Tendrils of orange and red flame curl up from below and around the mage, billowing smoke filling the upper background. The figure's posture is inward — head dipped, body slightly turned in a three-quarter pose — suggesting a moment of self-sacrifice or willed combustion rather than aggressive spellcasting. The palette is dominated by deep reds, blacks, and ember-orange, with smoke softening the edges. Lighting is harsh and underlit by the flames themselves, casting the robes in chiaroscuro.
foreground: robed mage wreathed in flame, head bowed
background: billowing smoke and rising fire, indistinct dark surroundings
emotion: inward, resigned, focused — head bowed, body still amid the flames
